summary: Completed testing of Stripe Pricing Plans & Feature Gating implementation. Backend: 20/20 API tests passed. Frontend: PricingPage displays correctly with 3 plans (Free £0, Pro £39, Elite £99) in GBP. Feature gating integrated into ReportsPage and StoresPage.
passed_tests: All plans have features and feature_descriptions
Elite plan has all premium features enabled (early_trend_access, automation_insights, advanced_opportunities, unlimited stores)
Free plan has correct limits (preview reports, 1 store, no early_trend_access)
Pro plan has correct limits (full reports, 5 stores, no early_trend_access)
Plans response includes all required fields
All 3 plans visible with correct GBP prices
Most Popular badge on Pro plan
Upgrade button redirects to login when not authenticated
critical_code_review_comments: SubscriptionService properly implements Stripe checkout session creation with GBP currency
FeatureGate utility class provides consistent feature access checks
Webhook handler processes subscription events and updates user profiles
PricingPage frontend matches backend plan configuration
useSubscription hook provides subscription context throughout the app
UpgradePrompts components (LockedContent, UpgradeBadge, UpgradeCard, StoreLimitPrompt, ReportUpgradePrompt, etc.) properly exported
ReportsPage shows ReportUpgradePrompt for free users
StoresPage shows StoreLimitPrompt when store limit reached
test_credentials: None required for public endpoints. Auth endpoints correctly return 401/422
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe subscription system fully implemented. Backend endpoints: GET /api/stripe/plans (public), GET /api/stripe/subscription (auth required), GET /api/stripe/feature-access (auth required), POST /api/stripe/create-checkout-session (auth required), POST /api/stripe/create-portal-session (auth required), POST /api/stripe/webhook (public but requires proper event format), POST /api/stripe/cancel-subscription (auth required). Plans: Free (£0, 1 store, limited), Pro (£39, 5 stores, full reports), Elite (£99, unlimited stores, all features). Frontend: PricingPage at /pricing, useSubscription hook, UpgradePrompts components for feature gating.

feature_gating.reports_page: Uses useSubscription and ReportUpgradePrompt for free users
feature_gating.stores_page: Uses useSubscription and StoreLimitPrompt when limit reached
